events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: this is a **fail**, high risk. Backing equipment near an open trench without a spotter is a common but non-compliant shortcut under OSHA 1926 Subpart O (§1926.601(b)(4)/602 spotter requirements), compounded by trench cave-in/struck-by exposure. Work must stop until a spotter (or verified back-up alarm plus barricaded safe zone) is in place before backing resumes.
